parsed.generic_mechanism: A sustains a cumulative explanatory sequence; B reverses and fragments that sequence, severing referents and placing setup after conclusions, so competent local sentences remain but chapter-scale momentum and closure collapse.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A moves from a concrete animal observation through broader claims, historical context, health stakes, and a perceptual exercise. Energetic examples create momentum, though repeated questions, capitalized slogans, promotional assertions, and a bullet recap blunt nuance and overextend the middle.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B retains vivid individual details but presents conclusions, instructions, examples, and headings in reverse-fragmented order. Pronouns and transitions point toward displaced setup, topic shifts lack bridges, and the final return to the opening premise leaves the chapter unresolved.
